rules.title: Broaden over-filtered search
rules.description: Clear narrow metadata filters or add schema, fields, resource type, format, or clinical terms before treating low evidence coverage as real.

rules.title: Broaden the search
rules.description: Remove restrictive filters, use fewer exact terms, or reindex trusted knowledge before relying on this package.

rules.title: Require human review
rules.description: Treat the query text as untrusted data and require review before running write-capable or agent handoff steps.
Run a targeted remediation search or add an approved source for this required evidence class.
Run a terminology-focused search so selected evidence grounds this detected medical concept before downstream use.
rules.empty_match_description: Add or reindex approved terminology sources that ground the detected medical concepts.

rules.title: Replace blocked evidence source
rules.description: Remove blocked or failed source evidence from the package and retrieve an approved source before downstream use.

rules.title: Review source governance
rules.description: Check source policy, license constraints, lifecycle state, and reviewer state before using this evidence package.

rules.title: Rewrite the query
rules.description: Use more specific clinical terms, identifiers, standards, or schema fields so the top result has stronger exact-term support.

rules.title: Diversify selected sources
rules.description: Apply source, standard, or clinical-domain filters to reduce duplicate-source evidence before downstream use.

rules.title: Repair source provenance
rules.description: Reindex the source with version and locator metadata, or replace the evidence with an auditable source.
